understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place the blue circle piece onto the goal tile marked '+' at [6, 10] within a limited number of steps.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions like MOVE_RIGHT move the currently selected piece by one tile in that direction if unobstructed. CLICK on a different selectable piece switches selection to that piece, and clicking on an empty goal tile teleports the currently selected piece to that goal. Pieces cannot move through walls or other pieces. The level is won when all goal tiles are occupied simultaneously.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place the blue circle piece onto the goal tile marked '+' at [6, 10] within a limited number of steps.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions like MOVE_RIGHT move the currently selected piece by one tile in that direction if unobstructed. CLICK on a different selectable piece switches selection to that piece, and clicking on an empty goal tile teleports the currently selected piece to that goal. Pieces cannot move through walls or other pieces. The level is won when all goal tiles are occupied simultaneously.
